case_id: material requisition with products Azalea Bush and Elm Tree

Web search confirmed CO is iDempiere's document status code for Completed. Verified via https://wiki.idempiere.org/en/IDempiere_Documents and DocStatus.txt documentation in iDempiere GitHub repository
Date matches task.json description field (line 20): 'Document Date: 07/15/2024'. Format is standard YYYY-MM-DD used in PostgreSQL databases as shown in export_result.sh (line 44: TO_CHAR format)
Date matches task.json description field (line 22): 'Date Required: 08/01/2024'. Format is standard YYYY-MM-DD used in PostgreSQL as shown in export_result.sh (line 45: TO_CHAR format)

Verified as real GardenWorld product. Cross-referenced in 8 other task.json files (configure_customer_credit_and_order shows m_product_id=128, create_customer_shipment, create_inventory_move, create_material_receipt, create_physical_inventory, create_price_list, create_vendor_invoice). Confirmed to be part of standard iDempiere GardenWorld seed database
Quantity explicitly stated in task.json description (line 24): 'Line 1: Product = Azalea Bush, Quantity = 50'

Verified as real GardenWorld product. Cross-referenced in 6 other task.json files (configure_product_replenishment, create_customer_shipment, create_material_receipt, create_physical_inventory, create_price_list). Confirmed to be part of standard iDempiere GardenWorld seed database
Quantity explicitly stated in task.json description (line 26): 'Line 2: Product = Elm Tree, Quantity = 25'

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims have been verified. The task creates a material requisition in iDempiere GardenWorld with description 'Seasonal stock replenishment - Summer 2024' and document status 'CO' (Completed). Document date is 07/15/2024, required date is 08/01/2024. The requisition contains two real GardenWorld products: Azalea Bush (m_product_id=128, quantity 50) and Elm Tree (quantity 25). Both products exist in the standard iDempiere GardenWorld seed database and are referenced across multiple other tasks. The dates follow standard PostgreSQL YYYY-MM-DD format.
